headline: We test drove the new Corvette. Why it's a 'bargain' at $200K
summary: Corvette (GM) is coming out with its new 2026 ZR1 car. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian joins Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre on Asking for a Trend to talk about his test drive, highlighting what people should know about the vehicle. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Asking for a Trend.

headline: Iran War Sends Oil To $90, Jobs Shock Compounds Fears: This Week On Wall Street
summary: Oil prices near $90 as the Hormuz crisis disrupts supply, sending airline and cruise stocks like DAL, RCL and CCL sharply lower amid weak jobs data.

headline: Ford Recalls Millions of Cars. The Stock Is Down.
summary: Ford Motor  is facing another round of recalls.  The company reported almost 2.4 million recalls in six separate actions on Tuesday, according to data posted on the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration website.  The latest batch of recalls were mainly related to issues with backup cameras and windshield wipers.

summary: Ford's February EV sales plunged 71% as F-150 Lightning demand collapsed. F scales back electric ambitions and refocuses on hybrids and ICE models.

headline: GM and Ford: Bank of America Names 2 Top Auto Stocks to Buy for 2026
summary: The changeover of Presidential Administrations always brings changes of policy priorities, and those can ripple outward. Sometimes, it’s impossible to know where the ripples will end, and sometimes, it’s easy. Last month, one of the easier ripples made itself felt. The second Trump Administration took office promising to roll back large parts of the Biden regulatory regime, including difficult findings on greenhouse gases and automobile fuel economy.
